creator: grahamperrin@gmail.com
text:
Spun off from <https://old.reddit.com/r/freebsd/comments/1i2u8eb/is_raid5_available_on_freebsd/m7jvkbe/?context=1>

base b218441ac074d9cb9417e284980bf87f79a89585 (2021-03-28) added a deprecation notice to the manual page, AFAICT /usr/doc/website/content/en/releases/ had no corresponding release note. 

<https://man.freebsd.org/cgi/man.cgi?query=gvinum&sektion=8&manpath=FreeBSD+15.0-CURRENT> states: 

> … More information is available at 
> https://wiki.freebsd.org/DeprecationPlan/gvinum. …

base a5f7047f28654aa297c57a9d24f6d1408641b975 (authored 2022-12-12, committed 2024-11-03) postponed removal. 

The wiki page is outdated. 

<https://github.com/bsdjhb/devsummit/blob/main/15.0/planning.md> does not mention gvinum.
